channel.title: Curcumin on VitaminDWiki
channel.description: Recent content in Curcumin on VitaminDWiki

item.title: Supplements taken by the founder of VitaminDWiki
item.description:
• Supplements: taken daily thru once a week
    • Receptor and Activation
      • VitaminDWiki - The risk of 50+ diseases at least double with poor Vitamin D Receptor
      • VitaminDWiki - Vitamin D Receptor activation can be increased in 15 ways

Supplements: taken daily thru once a week

(Manufacturer - rarely important, typically popular on Amazon)

Daily

  • Magnesium Co-Factor✻ VDR activate✻ 400 mg in water

    • need >100 mg average daily MgCl (bulk crystal, disolved in water)

  • Omega-3 Co-Factor✻ - tend to take it the in morning, (Coromega - tastes great)

item.title: Excellent reviews of supplements at ConsumerLab
item.description:
• 200+ supplement reviews at ConsumerLab include:
      • VitaminDWiki - Vitamin D is the 3rd most important contributor to health
      • VitaminDWiki - How non-US residents can buy high-dose Vitamin D and other supplements

200+ supplement reviews at ConsumerLab include:

Vitamin D, Omega-3, Magnesium, Vitamin K, B Vitamins, Probiotics, Turmeric/Curcumin, Ashwagandha, Iron, Quercetin, Resveratrol, Selenium, Tuna, Zinc

I have been subscribing to their reviews for over a decade ($54/year)
Each review includes

  • 10-100 pages of science (with about 95% correct interpretation)

item.title: COVID-19 risk reduced 4X by each of: Vitamin D, Omega-3, Curcumin, Zinc (each increases D in cells)
item.description:
• Suspect that they can synergistically fight COVID-19
      • See also VitaminDWiki
      • Informal use of Vitamin D, Zinc, vitamin C, and probiotics reduced COVID deaths by 30X

Suspect that they can synergistically fight COVID-19

Guess a COVID-19 risk reduction >10X if take all 4 (similar to many vaccines)
    pairs and triples of them are known to synergistically fight many other health problems
Note: Omega-3, Curcumin, and Zinc each increase the Vitamin D getting to cells
Note: Only Vitamin D can be restored quickly (treatment), the others taking weeks or months (prevention)

item.title: Prostate Cancer PSA reduced by 60 ng of Vitamin D, Vitamin B complex, Omega-3, Curcumin and diet
item.description:
• Correlative Analysis of Vitamin D and Omega-3 Fatty Acid Intake in Men on Active Surveillance for Prostate Cancer
      • References

Correlative Analysis of Vitamin D and Omega-3 Fatty Acid Intake in Men on Active Surveillance for Prostate Cancer

Urology. 2021 Jun 15;S0090-4295(21)00525-2. doi: 10.1016/j.urology.2021.04.050

Rebecca A Campbell 1, Jianbo Li 2, Lindsay Malone 3, David A Levy 4

Chart via Google Images

Objectves: To investigate the influence of targeted serum vitamin-D level and omega-6:3 fatty-acid ratio on prostate-specific antigen (PSA) level in men with prostate cancer managed with active surveillance by providing a nutritional intervention and vitamin supplementation.

item.title: Some curcumin supplements are 100 X more bioavailable
Curcumin may increase Vitamin D in tissues (activates Vitamin D Receptor)
item.description:
Curcumin Reviews

Examine.com summaries 37 aspects Nov 2019

Google Scholar found 147 studies cited this study as of July 2023

  • Vitamin D status and its management for achieving optimal health benefits in the elderly – Oct 2018 https://doi.org/10.1080/17446651.2018.1533401

  • Chapter 87 - Nonsecosteroidal Ligands and Modulators of Vitamin D Receptor – 2018 Book chapter https://doi.org/10.1016/B978-0-12-809963-6.00087-0

  • A Phase II Study of Curcumin and Vitamin D in Previously Untreated Patients with Early Stage Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia (CLL) or Small Lymphocytic Lymphoma (SLL) – 2018 https://doi.org/10.1182/blood-2018-99-112295
